---
name: Feature proposal
about: Propose a new skill, hook, rule, template change, or kit extension
title: '[PROPOSAL] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem this solves

<2–3 sentences. What pain are you experiencing right now? What would you do differently with this feature?>

## Proposed solution

<Concrete description. If it's a new skill, what does its description say? If a new validator rule, what does it check? If a template change, what's the new shape?>

## Alternatives considered

<What else did you try / think about? Why didn't those work?>

## Project type / context

- **Project type using the kit:** <web-app / mobile / cli / library / backend-service / data-pipeline / power-platform / automation>
- **Headcount on that project:** <1 / 2 / 3+>
- **How long have you been using the kit:** <days / weeks / months>

## Acceptance criteria

How would we know this is implemented well? List testable criteria:

- [ ] <bullet>
- [ ] <bullet>

## Boundary check

The kit is designed for solo / small-team (≤2 contributors) workflows. Does this proposal:

- [ ] Respect that boundary (it doesn't require multi-user assignment, real-time collab, etc.)?
- [ ] Stay stack-agnostic (works for web AND mobile AND CLI AND library AND data-pipeline AND power-platform)?
- [ ] Avoid duplicating an existing skill / rule / template?

If any answer is "no," explain why this is still worth doing.

## Willingness to PR

- [ ] I'd like to implement this myself.
- [ ] I'd like the maintainer to implement.
- [ ] I'm not sure yet — let's discuss.
